info.title: ApplicationInsightsManagementClient
info.description: Composite Swagger for Application Insights Management Client

get.description: Get the API Key for this key id.

parameters.name: resourceName
parameters.description: The name of the Application Insights component resource.

parameters.name: keyId
parameters.description: The API Key ID. This is unique within a Application Insights component.

delete.description: Delete an API Key of an Application Insights component.

parameters.name: resourceName
parameters.description: The name of the Application Insights component resource.

parameters.name: keyId
parameters.description: The API Key ID. This is unique within a Application Insights component.

get.description: Gets the list of annotations for a component for given time range

parameters.name: resourceName
parameters.description: The name of the Application Insights component resource.

parameters.name: start
parameters.description: The start time to query from for annotations, cannot be older than 90 days from current date.

parameters.name: end
parameters.description: The end time to query for annotations.

put.description: Create an Annotation of an Application Insights component.

parameters.name: resourceName
parameters.description: The name of the Application Insights component resource.

parameters.name: AnnotationProperties
parameters.description: Properties that need to be specified to create an annotation of a Application Insights component.

get.description: Get the annotation for given id.

parameters.name: resourceName
parameters.description: The name of the Application Insights component resource.

parameters.name: annotationId
parameters.description: The unique annotation ID. This is unique within a Application Insights component.

delete.description: Delete an Annotation of an Application Insights component.

parameters.name: resourceName
parameters.description: The name of the Application Insights component resource.

parameters.name: annotationId
parameters.description: The unique annotation ID. This is unique within a Application Insights component.

get.description: Gets a list of API keys of an Application Insights component.

parameters.name: resourceName
parameters.description: The name of the Application Insights component resource.

post.description: Create an API Key of an Application Insights component.

parameters.name: resourceName
parameters.description: The name of the Application Insights component resource.

parameters.name: APIKeyProperties
parameters.description: Properties that need to be specified to create an API Key of an Application Insights component.

get.description: Gets default work item configurations that exist for the application

parameters.name: resourceName
parameters.description: The name of the Application Insights component resource.

get.description: Gets a list of ProactiveDetection configurations of an Application Insights component.

parameters.name: resourceName
parameters.description: The name of the Application Insights component resource.

get.description: Get the ProactiveDetection configuration for this configuration id.

parameters.name: resourceName
parameters.description: The name of the Application Insights component resource.

parameters.name: ConfigurationId
parameters.description: The ProactiveDetection configuration ID. This is unique within a Application Insights component.

put.description: Update the ProactiveDetection configuration for this configuration id.

parameters.name: resourceName
parameters.description: The name of the Application Insights component resource.

parameters.name: ConfigurationId
parameters.description: The ProactiveDetection configuration ID. This is unique within a Application Insights component.

parameters.name: ProactiveDetectionProperties
parameters.description: Properties that need to be specified to update the ProactiveDetection configuration.

get.description: Gets the list work item configurations that exist for the application

parameters.name: resourceName
parameters.description: The name of the Application Insights component resource.

post.description: Create a work item configuration for an Application Insights component.

parameters.name: resourceName
parameters.description: The name of the Application Insights component resource.

parameters.name: WorkItemConfigurationProperties
parameters.description: Work item configuration creation payload

get.description: Gets specified work item configuration for an Application Insights component.

parameters.name: resourceName
parameters.description: The name of the Application Insights component resource.

parameters.name: workItemConfigId
parameters.description: The unique work item configuration Id. This can be either friendly name of connector as defined in connector configuration

patch.description: Update a work item configuration for an Application Insights component.

parameters.name: resourceName
parameters.description: The name of the Application Insights component resource.

parameters.name: workItemConfigId
parameters.description: The unique work item configuration Id. This can be either friendly name of connector as defined in connector configuration

parameters.name: WorkItemConfigurationProperties
parameters.description: Properties that need to be specified to update a work item configuration for this Application Insights component.

delete.description: Delete a work item configuration of an Application Insights component.

parameters.name: resourceName
parameters.description: The name of the Application Insights component resource.

parameters.name: workItemConfigId
parameters.description: The unique work item configuration Id. This can be either friendly name of connector as defined in connector configuration

get.description: Returns current billing features for an Application Insights component.

parameters.name: resourceName
parameters.description: The name of the Application Insights component resource.

put.description: Update current billing features for an Application Insights component.

parameters.name: resourceName
parameters.description: The name of the Application Insights component resource.

parameters.name: BillingFeaturesProperties
parameters.description: The request body

get.description: Gets a list of Continuous Export configuration of an Application Insights component.

parameters.name: resourceName
parameters.description: The name of the Application Insights component resource.

post.description: Create a Continuous Export configuration of an Application Insights component.

parameters.name: resourceName
parameters.description: The name of the Application Insights component resource.

parameters.name: ExportProperties
parameters.description: The request body

get.description: Get the Continuous Export configuration for this export id.

parameters.name: resourceName
parameters.description: The name of the Application Insights component resource.

parameters.name: exportId
parameters.description: The Continuous Export configuration ID. This is unique within a Application Insights component.

put.description: Update the Continuous Export configuration for this export id.

parameters.name: resourceName
parameters.description: The name of the Application Insights component resource.

parameters.name: exportId
parameters.description: The Continuous Export configuration ID. This is unique within a Application Insights component.

parameters.name: ExportProperties
parameters.description: Properties that need to be specified to update the Continuous Export configuration.

delete.description: Delete a Continuous Export configuration of an Application Insights component.

parameters.name: resourceName
parameters.description: The name of the Application Insights component resource.

parameters.name: exportId
parameters.description: The Continuous Export configuration ID. This is unique within a Application Insights component.

get.description: Returns feature capabilities of the application insights component.

parameters.name: resourceName
parameters.description: The name of the Application Insights component resource.

get.description: Returns all available features of the application insights component.

parameters.name: resourceName
parameters.description: The name of the Application Insights component resource.

get.description: Returns daily data volume cap (quota) status for an Application Insights component.

parameters.name: resourceName
parameters.description: The name of the Application Insights component resource.

APIKeyRequest.description: An Application Insights component API Key creation request definition.

name.description: The name of the API Key.

linkedReadProperties.description: The read access rights of this API Key.

linkedWriteProperties.description: The write access rights of this API Key.

Annotation.description: Annotation associated with an application insights resource.

Properties.description: Serialized JSON object for detailed properties

AnnotationError.description: Error associated with trying to create annotation with Id that already exist

nextLink.description: The url to the next page of results.

ApplicationInsightsComponentAPIKey.description: Properties that define an API key of an Application Insights Component.

id.description: The unique ID of the API key inside an Application Insights component. It is auto generated when the API key is created.

apiKey.description: The API key value. It will be only return once when the API Key was created.

createdDate.description: The create date of this API key.

name.description: The name of the API key.

linkedReadProperties.description: The read access rights of this API Key.

linkedWriteProperties.description: The write access rights of this API Key.

ApplicationInsightsComponentAPIKeyListRe.description: Describes the list of API Keys of an Application Insights Component.

nextLink.description: The url to the next page of results.

ApplicationInsightsComponentAvailableFea.description: An Application Insights component available features.

Result.description: A list of Application Insights component feature.

ApplicationInsightsComponentBillingFeatu.description: An Application Insights component billing features

DataVolumeCap.description: An Application Insights component daily data volume cap

CurrentBillingFeatures.description: Current enabled pricing plan. When the component is in the Enterprise plan, this will list both 'Basic' and 'Application Insights Enterprise'.

ApplicationInsightsComponentDataVolumeCa.description: An Application Insights component daily data volume cap

Cap.description: Daily data volume cap in GB.

ResetTime.description: Daily data volume cap UTC reset hour.

StopSendNotificationWhenHitCap.description: Do not send a notification email when the daily data volume cap is met.

MaxHistoryCap.description: Maximum daily data volume cap that the user can set for this component.

ApplicationInsightsComponentExportConfig.description: Properties that define a Continuous Export configuration.

ExportId.description: The unique ID of the export configuration inside an Application Insights component. It is auto generated when the Continuous Export configuration is created.

InstrumentationKey.description: The instrumentation key of the Application Insights component.

RecordTypes.description: This comma separated list of document types that will be exported. The possible values include 'Requests', 'Event', 'Exceptions', 'Metrics', 'PageViews', 'PageViewPerformance', 'Rdd', 'PerformanceCounters', 'Availability', 'Messages'.

ApplicationName.description: The name of the Application Insights component.

SubscriptionId.description: The subscription of the Application Insights component.

ResourceGroup.description: The resource group of the Application Insights component.

DestinationStorageSubscriptionId.description: The destination storage account subscription ID.

IsUserEnabled.description: This will be 'true' if the Continuous Export configuration is enabled, otherwise it will be 'false'.

LastUserUpdate.description: Last time the Continuous Export configuration was updated.

ExportStatus.description: This indicates current Continuous Export configuration status. The possible values are 'Preparing', 'Success', 'Failure'.

LastSuccessTime.description: The last time data was successfully delivered to the destination storage container for this Continuous Export configuration.

LastGapTime.description: The last time the Continuous Export configuration started failing.

PermanentErrorReason.description: This is the reason the Continuous Export configuration started failing. It can be 'AzureStorageNotFound' or 'AzureStorageAccessDenied'.

StorageName.description: The name of the destination storage account.

ContainerName.description: The name of the destination storage container.

ApplicationInsightsComponentExportReques.description: An Application Insights component Continuous Export configuration request definition.

RecordTypes.description: The document types to be exported, as comma separated values. Allowed values include 'Requests', 'Event', 'Exceptions', 'Metrics', 'PageViews', 'PageViewPerformance', 'Rdd', 'PerformanceCounters', 'Availability', 'Messages'.

DestinationType.description: The Continuous Export destination type. This has to be 'Blob'.

DestinationAddress.description: The SAS URL for the destination storage container. It must grant write permission.

IsEnabled.description: Set to 'true' to create a Continuous Export configuration as enabled, otherwise set it to 'false'.

DestinationStorageSubscriptionId.description: The subscription ID of the destination storage container.

DestinationStorageLocationId.description: The location ID of the destination storage container.

DestinationAccountId.description: The name of destination storage account.

ApplicationInsightsComponentFeature.description: An Application Insights component daily data volume cap status

MeterId.description: The meter id used for the feature.

MeterRateFrequency.description: The meter rate for the feature's meter.

Capabilities.description: A list of Application Insights component feature capability.

IsMainFeature.description: Whether can apply addon feature on to it.

SupportedAddonFeatures.description: The add on features on main feature.

ApplicationInsightsComponentFeatureCapab.description: An Application Insights component feature capabilities

SupportExportData.description: Whether allow to use continuous export feature.

WorkItemIntegration.description: Whether allow to use work item integration feature.

MultipleStepWebTest.description: Whether allow to use multiple steps web test feature.

TrackingType.description: The application insights component used tracking type.

DailyCap.description: Daily data volume cap in GB.

DailyCapResetTime.description: Daily data volume cap UTC reset hour.

ApplicationInsightsComponentFeatureCapab.description: An Application Insights component feature capability

MeterId.description: The meter used for the capability.

MeterRateFrequency.description: The meter rate of the meter.

ApplicationInsightsComponentProactiveDet.description: Properties that define a ProactiveDetection configuration.

enabled.description: A flag that indicates whether this rule is enabled by the user

sendEmailsToSubscriptionOwners.description: A flag that indicated whether notifications on this rule should be sent to subscription owners

customEmails.description: Custom email addresses for this rule notifications

lastUpdatedTime.description: The last time this rule was updated

ruleDefinitions.description: Static definitions of the ProactiveDetection configuration rule (same values for all components).

ApplicationInsightsComponentProactiveDet.description: Static definitions of the ProactiveDetection configuration rule (same values for all components).

DisplayName.description: The rule name as it is displayed in UI

HelpUrl.description: URL which displays additional info about the proactive detection rule

IsHidden.description: A flag indicating whether the rule is hidden (from the UI)

IsEnabledByDefault.description: A flag indicating whether the rule is enabled by default

IsInPreview.description: A flag indicating whether the rule is in preview

SupportsEmailNotifications.description: A flag indicating whether email notifications are supported for detections for this rule

ApplicationInsightsComponentQuotaStatus.description: An Application Insights component daily data volume cap status

AppId.description: The Application ID for the Application Insights component.

ShouldBeThrottled.description: The daily data volume cap is met, and data ingestion will be stopped.

ExpirationTime.description: Date and time when the daily data volume cap will be reset, and data ingestion will resume.

WorkItemConfiguration.description: Work item configuration associated with an application insights resource.

ConnectorId.description: Connector identifier where work item is created

IsDefault.description: Boolean value indicating whether configuration is default

ConfigProperties.description: Serialized JSON object for detailed properties

WorkItemConfigurationError.description: Error associated with trying to get work item configuration or configurations

value.description: An array of work item configurations.

nextLink.description: The url to the next page of results.

ConnectorDataConfiguration.description: Serialized JSON object for detailed properties
